sections.name: listening
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Listen to short dialogues and judge if a given statement is true or false. Part 2 (15 items): Listen to medium-length dialogues and answer multiple-choice questions. Part 3 (20 items): Listen to longer interviews or monologues and answer comprehension questions.

sections.name: reading
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Choose the correct word or phrase for each blank in sentences. Part 2 (10 items): Match sentences or fragments to complete a text. Part 3 (20 items): Read medium-length passages and answer comprehension questions.

sections.name: writing
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Reorder jumbled words into grammatically correct sentences. Part 2 (5 items): Write a short paragraph (80 characters) based on a prompt or set of provided words.

scoring_notes: Each section scored 0–100. Total is sum of three sections. 180/300 required to pass. Writing includes a short composition component.
